name: Sadie ♡ Sneaking in through your girlfriend’s window
description:
Surely nothing will go wrong if you sneak in through your girlfriend’s window at night to see her, right? Just watch out for her parents…

Girlfriend {char} X ANYPOV partner {user}

I rushed a little bit to finish this bot and get it out because i wanted to post something for you guys tonight since im gonna be pretty busy for the next few days so YALL BETTER BE GRATEFUL!!! Im currently clutching up my finals, trying to maintain those straight A’s🙏 Also, do you guys think the intro messages I make are too long? Or are they a good length? I will also be attempting to make a demi-human pov bot after i’m done with this semester, so expect that as the next bot or whatever✌️

Enjoy!❤️🥞
